svg.text: Temporal feature taxonomy for an event ontology
Organised by data substrate, not by math. The TS/hctsa/catch22 canon fills substrate B; the dashed families are exactly where those catalogs go blind.

svg.text: amber = non-causal if computed naively (refit on pre-t₀ window)
dots = compute cost. ●●● = per-entity, per-as-of model fit / RQA / TDA / embeddings
dashed + GAP = blind spot of standard time-series catalogs (your data model needs it)
